Labs (hello@polytope.technology)","details":"Abstract base contract for the IntentGateway. Contains all shared state, constants, errors, events, and chain-agnostic utility functions.","errors":{"Cancelled()":[{"details":"Thrown when attempting to act on an already cancelled order."}],"Expired()":[{"details":"Thrown when attempting to fill an order past its deadline."}],"Filled()":[{"details":"Thrown when attempting to fill or cancel an order that has already been finalized."}],"InsufficientNativeToken()":[{"details":"Thrown when insufficient native token (ETH) is provided or a transfer fails."}],"InvalidInput()":[{"details":"Thrown when function arguments fail validation."}],"NotExpired()":[{"details":"Thrown when attempting to cancel an order that has not yet expired."}],"Unauthorized()":[{"details":"Thrown when the caller is not authorized to perform the action."}],"UnknownOrder()":[{"details":"Thrown when no escrow exists for the given commitment and token."}],"WrongChain()":[{"details":"Thrown when an operation is invoked on the wrong chain for the given order."}]},"events":{"DeploymentAdded(string,address)":{"details":"Emitted when a new gateway instance is registered for a remote state machine.","params":{"chain":"The state machine identifier for the new deployment.","gateway":"The address of the deployed gateway on that chain."}},"DestinationProtocolFeeUpdated(string,uint256)":{"details":"Emitted when a destination-specific protocol fee override is set via governance.","params":{"chain":"The destination state machine identifier.","feeBps":"The protocol fee in basis points for orders targeting this destination."}},"DustCollected(address,uint256)":{"details":"Emitted when surplus tokens are retained by the protocol. This includes protocol fee deductions, surplus shares from overpayment, and residual balances swept from the CallDispatcher after calldata execution.","params":{"amount":"The amount collected.","token":"The token address (address(0) for native token)."}},"DustSwept(address,uint256,address)":{"details":"Emitted when accumulated protocol dust is swept to a beneficiary via governance.","params":{"amount":"The amount swept.","beneficiary":"The recipient of the swept tokens.","token":"The token address (address(0) for native token)."}},"EIP712DomainChanged()":{"details":"MAY be emitted to signal that the domain could have changed."},"EscrowRefunded(bytes32,(bytes32,uint256)[])":{"details":"Emitted when escrowed tokens are refunded to the original user after cancellation.","params":{"commitment":"The order commitment hash.","tokens":"The tokens and amounts refunded."}},"EscrowReleased(bytes32,(bytes32,uint256)[])":{"details":"Emitted when escrowed tokens are released to the solver after a successful fill.","params":{"commitment":"The order commitment hash.","tokens":"The tokens and amounts released."}},"OrderFilled(bytes32,address,(bytes32,uint256)[],(bytes32,uint256)[])":{"details":"Emitted when an order is fully filled by a solver.","params":{"commitment":"The order commitment hash.","filler":"The address of the solver who filled the order.","inputs":"The escrowed input tokens released to the solver.","outputs":"The output token amounts provided by the solver."}},"OrderPlaced(bytes32,string,string,uint256,uint256,uint256,address,bytes32,(bytes32,uint256)[],(bytes32,uint256)[],(bytes32,uint256)[])":{"details":"Emitted when a new intent order is placed and input tokens are escrowed.","params":{"beneficiary":"The recipient of the output tokens on the destination chain.","deadline":"The block number after which the order expires.","destination":"The destination chain's state machine identifier.","fees":"The Hyperbridge relayer fees paid by the user.","inputs":"The escrowed input tokens (after protocol fee deduction).","nonce":"The unique order nonce assigned by the gateway.","outputs":"The desired output tokens on the destination chain.","predispatch":"The tokens sent to the CallDispatcher for pre-order execution.","session":"The session key address authorized to select a solver.","source":"The source chain's state machine identifier.","user":"The order creator's address encoded as bytes32."}},"ParamsUpdated((address,address,bool,uint256,uint256,address),(address,address,bool,uint256,uint256,address))":{"details":"Emitted when the gateway's configuration parameters are updated via governance.","params":{"current":"The new parameter values.","previous":"The previous parameter values."}},"PartialFill(bytes32,address,(bytes32,uint256)[],(bytes32,uint256)[])":{"details":"Emitted when an order is partially filled by a solver. Only applicable to same-chain orders which support incremental fills.","params":{"commitment":"The order commitment hash.","filler":"The address of the solver who provided this partial fill.","inputs":"The proportional escrowed input tokens released to the solver.","outputs":"The output token amounts provided in this fill."}}},"kind":"dev","methods":{"DOMAIN_SEPARATOR()":{"details":"Returns the EIP-712 domain separator for this contract. Used by off-chain signers to construct typed data hashes for solver selection signatures.","returns":{"_0":"The EIP-712 domain separator hash."}},"eip712Domain()":{"details":"See {IERC-5267}."},"host()":{"details":"Returns the address of the Hyperbridge host contract. This function is virtual to allow derived contracts to resolve diamond inheritance conflicts.","returns":{"_0":"The host contract address from stored params."}}},"stateVariables":{"FILLED_SLOT_BIG_ENDIAN_BYTES":{"details":"Big-endian encoding of storage slot 2 (the `_filled` mapping slot). Used to construct storage proof keys for cross-chain cancel verification."},"SELECT_SOLVER_TYPEHASH":{"details":"EIP-712 typehash for solver selection signatures. Encodes the struct: SelectSolver(bytes32 commitment, address solver)."},"TRANSACTION_FEES":{"details":"Sentinel address used as the key for storing Hyperbridge relayer fees in the `_orders` mapping. Derived from keccak256(\"txFees\") to avoid collisions with real token addresses."},"_destinationProtocolFees":{"details":"Maps keccak256(stateMachineId) to a destination-specific protocol fee override in basis points. If zero, the global `_params.protocolFeeBps` is used."},"_filled":{"details":"Maps order commitment hashes to the address that filled or refunded the order. A non-zero value indicates the order has been finalized and cannot be filled again."},"_instances":{"details":"Maps keccak256(stateMachineId) to the registered gateway address for that chain. Used for authenticating cross-chain messages and routing dispatches."},"_nonce":{"details":"Monotonically increasing counter used to assign unique nonces to orders. Each call to `placeOrder` consumes and increments this value."},"_orders":{"details":"Maps (commitment, token address) to the escrowed amount for that token. Decremented as tokens are released via fills or refunds."},"_params":{"details":"Gateway configuration parameters including host address, dispatcher, fee settings, price oracle, and solver selection toggle."},"_partialFills":{"details":"Maps (commitment, output token) to the cumulative amount already filled. Used to track partial fill progress for same-chain orders."},"_paused":{"details":"Appended last to preserve existing storage slots."}},"title":"IntentsBase","version":1},"userdoc":{"kind":"user","methods":{},"version":1}},"settings":{"compilationTarget":{"src/apps/intentsv2/IntentsBase.sol":"IntentsBase"},"evmVersion":"cancun","libraries":{},"metadata":{"bytecodeHash":"ipfs"},"optimizer":{"enabled":true,"runs":200},"remappings":[":@hyperbridge/core/=src/hyperbridge/core/",":@openzeppelin/=lib/openzeppelin-contracts/",":@polytope-labs/solidity-merkle-trees/=src/solidity-merkle-trees/",":forge-std/=lib/forge-std/src/",":openzeppelin-contracts/=lib/openzeppelin-contracts/",":uniswap/=src/uniswap/"],"viaIR":true},"sources":{"lib/openzeppelin-contracts/contracts/interfaces/IERC1363.sol":{"keccak256":"0x9b6b3e7803bc5f2f8cd7ad57db8ac1def61a9930a5a3107df4882e028a9605d7","license":"MIT","urls":["bzz-raw://da62d6be1f5c6edf577f0cb45666a8aa9c2086a4bac87d95d65f02e2f4c36a4b","dweb:/ipfs/QmNkpvBpoCMvX8JwAFNSc5XxJ2q5BXJpL5L1txb4QkqVFF"]},"lib/openzeppelin-contracts/contracts/interfaces/IERC165.sol":{"keccak256":"0xde7e9fd9aee8d4f40772f96bb3b58836cbc6dfc0227014a061947f8821ea9724","license":"MIT","urls":["bzz-raw://11fea9f8bc98949ac6709f0c1699db7430d2948137aa94d5a9e95a91f61a710a","dweb:/ipfs/QmQdfRXxQjwP6yn3DVo1GHPpriKNcFghSPi94Z1oKEFUNS"]},"lib/openzeppelin-contracts/contracts/interfaces/IERC20.sol":{"keccak256":"0xce41876e78d1badc0512229b4d14e4daf83bc1003d7f83978d18e0e56f965b9c","license":"MIT","urls":["bzz-raw://a2608291cb038b388d80b79a06b6118a42f7894ff67b7da10ec0dbbf5b2973ba","dweb:/ipfs/QmWohqcBLbcxmA4eGPhZDXe5RYMMEEpFq22nfkaUMvTfw1"]},"lib/openzeppelin-contracts/contracts/interfaces/IERC5267.sol":{"keccak256":"0x92aa1df62dc3d33f1656d63bede0923e0df0b706ad4137c8b10b0a8fe549fd92","license":"MIT","urls":["bzz-raw://c5c0f29195ad64cbe556da8e257dac8f05f78c53f90323c0d2accf8e6922d33a","dweb:/ipfs/QmQ61TED8uaCZwcbh8KkgRSsCav7x7HbcGHwHts3U4DmUP"]},"lib/openzeppelin-contracts/contracts/token/ERC20/IERC20.sol":{"keccak256":"0xe06a3f08a987af6ad2e1c1e774405d4fe08f1694b67517438b467cecf0da0ef7","license":"MIT","urls" DOMAIN_SEPARATOR().details: Returns the EIP-712 domain separator for this contract. Used by off-chain signers to construct typed data hashes for solver selection signatures.

host().details: Returns the address of the Hyperbridge host contract. This function is virtual to allow derived contracts to resolve diamond inheritance conflicts.

returns._0: The host contract address from stored params.
